DP.210.0000:
What?! No way!
You have the key?\f
Locking the door was meaningless!
I am the loser in this after all!\f
This is no time for self-pity!
I’ve got to alert the Commander!\f
DP.210.0001:
My Pokémon can’t battle anymore.\f
They’re gonna take away my Pokémon
for messing this one up...\f
Humph! Just you wait!
Our Commander will smoosh you!
DP.210.0002:
I’m one of Team Galactic’s three
Commanders.\f
We’ve been trying to create a new
world that’s better than this one...\f
But people have shown little
understanding about what we do.\f
You don’t understand either, do you?
It’s a little saddening...\f
So, let’s have a battle to decide
what we should do next.\f
If I win, you leave.\f
If you win, we, Team Galactic, will
leave!\f
DP.210.0003:
Oops!
I messed that one up!\f
That’s all right, though.
I quite enjoyed our battle.\f
I guess it’s time to say good-bye
and leave for the time being!\f
DP.210.0004:
Team Galactic...\f
They were saying they had to gather
Pokémon and energy no matter what.\f
It was for creating a new universe,
or so they claimed.\f
Nothing they said made any sort
of sense to me.\f
I can’t tell you how grateful
I am for saving me.\f
I can finally see my little daughter
again!\f
DP.210.0005:
Little girl: Papa!\f
Yuck! Papa, you’re stinky!
Go shower now, stinky!\f
DP.210.0006:
Papa: Oh, sorry! Ahaha!
They had me working nonstop!\f
DP.210.0007:
Little girl: Thank you, Trainer!
You made those bad people go away!\f
I think the balloon Pokémon will
come visiting again!
DP.210.0008:
Papa: Oh, yes, a balloon Pokémon
appears in front of the windworks.\f
It’s always a certain day of the
week, but I’m not sure which day.\f
Could its appearance have something
to do with this windworks\r
using wind-generated energy?
DP.210.0009:
The Valley Windworks uses turbines
to capture energy from winds driven\r
from the mountains in this canyon.\f
We produce energy from the power of
nature itself. It’s quite wonderful.
DP.210.0010:
If the balloon Pokémon came,
the wind would blow it away!
